subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned toward the Supreme Kingdom! Through the perpetual grace of the Almighty Lord, I beseech that heavenly gifts may pour down like rain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت اعلی از فیض مستمر خداوند مقتدر چنان ملتمسم که مواهب چون ماء
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
